                                                     Apply results                                                      
┏━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓
┃ Action   ┃ uid_ref              ┃ Keeper UID       ┃ Details                                                         ┃
┡━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┩
│ create   │ acme-lab-linux2      │ UID-CREATE-001   │ dry_run=True                                                    │
│ update   │ acme-lab-linux1-root │ UID-USER-001     │ dry_run=True                                                    │
│ delete   │ old-db               │ UID-DELETE-001   │ dry_run=True                                                    │
│ conflict │ acme-lab-linux3      │ UID-CONFLICT-001 │ reason=unmanaged record with matching title; pass --adopt or    │
│          │                      │                  │ use an import workflow to claim it                              │
│ noop     │ acme-lab-cfg         │ UID-NOOP-001     │                                                                 │
└──────────┴──────────────────────┴──────────────────┴─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
